label: Funding Rate Matrix
description: Heatmap of annualised funding rates per coin per venue. Highlights rates below floor threshold.

l0.notes: All 9 checks pass. Error boundary: WidgetErrorBoundary + React.Suspense in widget-wrapper.tsx covers all grid widgets globally. requiredEntitlements: ["execution-basic","execution-full"] — non-empty. availableOn: ["defi"] — non-empty. No `any` types or `@ts-ignore` in widget file. No lib/mocks/ imports in widget (FUNDING_RATE_VENUES and FUNDING_RATE_FLOOR come from lib/config/services/defi.config.ts). Loading state: context is synchronous mock data with no async loading phase; Suspense fallback in widget-wrapper.tsx covers rendering delays — N/A for explicit isLoading guard. Empty state: coins.length === 0 guard renders "No funding rate data" message. Error state: WidgetErrorBoundary in widget-wrapper.tsx catches all render-time exceptions globally — no additional per-widget error guard needed. No dead code.

1.1.note: — widget reads exclusively via useDeFiData() hook; no inline fetch or direct imports of data.

1.2.note: — defi-data-context.tsx calls useGlobalScope() (line 188) and derives hasDefiDesk from globalScope.organizationIds.

1.3.note: — org filter changes data: hasDefiDesk zeroes token balances, empties lending protocols and bridge routes when a non-DeFi org is selected.

1.4.note: — clientIds are in globalScope but client-level cascade is not explicitly wired in context; org filter acts as a coarse proxy. Funding matrix data (MOCK_FUNDING_RATES) is not filtered by clientIds. This is a context-level gap, not a widget-level issue; widget itself is read-only consumer.

1.5.note: — strategyIds filter applied to tradeHistory in context (line 203-211).

1.6.note: — empty organizationIds → hasDefiDesk=true → full dataset returned (line 191-193).

1.7.note: — FUNDING_RATE_VENUES and FUNDING_RATE_FLOOR are in lib/config/services/defi.config.ts; MOCK_FUNDING_RATES lives in lib/mocks/fixtures/defi-walkthrough.ts (context layer, not widget). Widget file imports only from config — correct location.

l1.notes: 1.1 PASS — widget reads exclusively via useDeFiData() hook; no inline fetch or direct imports of data. 1.2 PASS — defi-data-context.tsx calls useGlobalScope() (line 188) and derives hasDefiDesk from globalScope.organizationIds. 1.3 PASS — org filter changes data: hasDefiDesk zeroes token balances, empties lending protocols and bridge routes when a non-DeFi org is selected. 1.4 PARTIAL — clientIds are in globalScope but client-level cascade is not explicitly wired in context; org filter acts as a coarse proxy. Funding matrix data (MOCK_FUNDING_RATES) is not filtered by clientIds. This is a context-level gap, not a widget-level issue; widget itself is read-only consumer. 1.5 PASS — strategyIds filter applied to tradeHistory in context (line 203-211). 1.6 PASS — empty organizationIds → hasDefiDesk=true → full dataset returned (line 191-193). 1.7 PASS — FUNDING_RATE_VENUES and FUNDING_RATE_FLOOR are in lib/config/services/defi.config.ts; MOCK_FUNDING_RATES lives in lib/mocks/fixtures/defi-walkthrough.ts (context layer, not widget). Widget file imports only from config — correct location.

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab (structured {domain, tier} entitlements across all 17 register.ts files + 5 PageEntitlementGate wrappers) and f9f29ea (65 automated tests in __tests__/integration/entitlement-wiring.test.ts, __tests__/components/platform/*entitlement-gate.test.tsx, __tests__/lib/config/trading-entitlements.test.ts). Re-audit per-widget only if the wiring test fails or entitlements are added.

gaps.notes: CARRY_BASIS_PERP §6 DeFi/spot + perp (cross chain): Bridge latency breaks LEADER_HEDGE deadline — needs longer max_hedge_delay_ms config + bridge state machine integration
ARBITRAGE_PRICE_DISPERSION §11 CeFi/perp: UAC lacks funding_arb flag distinct from price-arb

knownIssues: Mock import fixed — moved to defi.config.ts

findings.description: 0.1 Error boundary — WidgetErrorBoundary class defined in widget-wrapper.tsx wraps all grid widgets via WidgetBody. Verified present.
0.5 Mock import — FUNDING_RATE_VENUES and FUNDING_RATE_FLOOR correctly sourced from lib/config/services/defi.config.ts (not lib/mocks/). Previously fixed.

0.6 Loading state — DeFiDataContext is synchronous mock data; no async loading phase exists. React.Suspense fallback in widget-wrapper.tsx covers rendering delays. No explicit isLoading guard required.
0.8 Error state — global WidgetErrorBoundary in widget-wrapper.tsx catches render-time exceptions. No per-widget error UI required.

1.4 Client filter not explicitly wired in defi-data-context.tsx — clientIds from globalScope are not used to filter fundingRates. Org-level filter (hasDefiDesk) acts as coarse proxy. This is a context-level gap, not a widget-level issue.
